ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that the corporate VPN will undergo maintenance on Friday, May 18th from 10:00 PM to 12:00 AM. During this window, all VPN services will be unavailable. Please plan accordingly and ensure you have offline access to critical documents. If you need assistance migrating your connections or have questions, contact IT support at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Alex Johnson
IT Infrastructure Manager

spam.subject: Critical Action Required: Your University Scholarship Offer
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for the prestigious XYZ University Graduate Scholarship 2026. Congratulations! However, to process your scholarship funds, we must verify your personal information and complete a short enrollment form. Please click the link below to accept your award and submit required documents:

<URL>

If you do not complete this within 48 hours, your award will be revoked. For any questions, contact scholarship office at <URL>.

Thank you for choosing XYZ University.

Sincerely,
Dr. John Smith
Director of Scholarships
XYZ University
